title: Why Single-File HTML is the New Markdown in 2026
summary: Better Stack argues that single-file HTML is becoming a primary markup format comparable to Markdown's current role. The claim positions HTML as an emerging standard for 2026, suggesting a shift in how developers approach document formats and tooling.
